context_text:
SMILE INDEX: 3
WINDOW: 154.533s to 190.033s (smile at 174.533s to 175.033s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[150.730-155.646] interviewer: They are readjusting the lens.
[155.646-157.080] interviewer: OK, go.
[157.080-434.930] interviewee: In 1915, my parents moved from Austria to Germany. It was close, all in the same neighborhood on the border. And they picked me up. I refused to go. I said this to my parents. I don't want to go with you. But as a child, you get used to it. I had an older brother-- one year older. And we moved to Tarnowiec. In Tarnowiec, I was a grown up. I was raised there.

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
I said this to my parents. I don't want to go with you.

context_segments.speaker: interviewee
context_segments.text: In 1915, my parents moved from Austria to Germany. It was close, all in the same neighborhood on the border. And they picked me up. I refused to go. I said this to my parents. I don't want to go with you. But as a child, you get used to it. I had an older brother-- one year older. And we moved to Tarnowiec. In Tarnowiec, I was a grown up. I was raised there.
